title: His Dog
writer: John W. Krafft, Olga Printzlau, Albert Payson Terhune
actors: Joseph Schildkraut, Julia Faye, Crauford Kent
plot: Peter Olsen, a young social outcast who lives alone on a rundown farm and raises vegetables for a living, finds his only consolation in liquor, though Dorcas Chatham, daughter of the general store owner, begs him to forego this in...
